author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: ssrf_profile_image_url
summary: Re-runs the profile-image SSRF probe: registers a throwaway user, posts a marker URL to /profile/image/url, and verifies whether the URL persists on the user record.

args.--marker-host: Host name to embed in the supplied imageUrl (default 169.254.169.254)
